news.title: Co-ops at IU Indianapolis power Indiana’s workforce in key industries like biosciences, tourism
news.summary_en: Workforce development opportunities at IU Indianapolis are helping student gain valuable career development experiences and local businesses fill roles.

news.title: IU opens its free generative AI course to anyone worldwide
